name: American Studies
note: Requires a minimum cumulative 2.0 GPA in all courses counted toward the major.

items.title: History of the United States to 1865
History of the United States Since 1865
Topics in American Studies: United States Pluralism

sections.label: One American Literature Course
sections.description: One American literature course from the English Department, chosen in consultation with the American Studies coordinating panel.

sections.label: Five Additional Courses
sections.description: Five additional courses that focus on American culture, chosen in consultation with the American Studies coordinating panel. One course must be from the United States Pluralism group; one must be in economics (ECO), political science (POL), sociology (SOC), or education (EDU); two courses must be at the upper division level.
